articles.title: Ex-Liverpool boss Arne Slot rejects approach from Premier League club to take over as manager
articles.description: Former Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has rejected an opening approach from Fulham to become their next first-team manager. The Dutchman, who was dismissed by the Reds last week, quickly emerged as a prominent target for the Craven Cottage hierarchy but has chosen to turn down the opportunity to make an immediate return to the top flight.

The Flyers lead the series against Loyola 3-0. The programs last played on Dec. 22, 2007. Dayton won 91-74 at UD Arena. The first two games in the series took place in 1950 and 1951. articles.title: 'Leader' Happe signs two-year deal with Aberdeen
articles.description: Aberdeen manager Stephen Robinson believes new signing Dan Happe will bring leadership and aerial dominance to the Dons' defence. The 27-year-old centre-back has signed a two-year deal at Pittodrie - with the option for a third - and will join Aberdeen when his contract at Leyton Orient expires later this summer. Happe has spent his entire senior career with Orient, making over 250 appearances and earning promotion twice.
